data.name: PageTitle
data.value: Overview

data.name: PageHeading
data.value: Overview

data.name: Intro
data.value: Harpyx is organized like a set of shared libraries. Each library belongs to a tenant, is divided into workspaces, and contains projects where documents are uploaded and used by chat.

data.name: BuildingBlocksTitle
data.value: The Main Building Blocks

data.name: BuildingBlocksNameHeader
data.value: Name

data.name: BuildingBlocksMeaningHeader
data.value: Plain meaning

data.name: BuildingBlocksUsageHeader
data.value: How you use it

data.name: TenantLabel
data.value: Tenant

data.name: TenantMeaning
data.value: A separate area for a customer, team or organization.

data.name: TenantUsage
data.value: Pick the current tenant from the account menu before working.

data.name: WorkspaceLabel
data.value: Workspace

data.name: WorkspaceMeaning
data.value: A container that groups related projects.

data.name: WorkspaceUsage
data.value: Create workspaces for departments, clients or major topics.

data.name: ProjectLabel
data.value: Project

data.name: ProjectMeaning
data.value: The place where documents, prompts and chat live.

data.name: ProjectUsage
data.value: Open a project to upload files and ask questions about them.

data.name: DocumentLabel
data.value: Document

data.name: DocumentMeaning
data.value: A file or URL added to a project.

data.name: DocumentUsage
data.value: Wait until it is ready before using it as chat context.

data.name: TypicalDayTitle
data.value: A Typical Day In Harpyx

data.name: TypicalDayStepSignIn
data.value: Sign in with Google or Microsoft.

data.name: TypicalDayStepTenant
data.value: Check the current tenant in the account menu.

data.name: TypicalDayStepWorkspaces
data.value: Open Workspaces and choose where the work belongs.

data.name: TypicalDayStepProject
data.value: Create or open a project.

data.name: TypicalDayStepUpload
data.value: Upload files, archives, emails or add a document URL.

data.name: TypicalDayStepProcessing
data.value: Wait for document processing to finish.

data.name: TypicalDayStepChat
data.value: Select the documents you want to use and ask the project chat a question.

data.name: AfterUploadTitle
data.value: What Happens After Upload

data.name: AfterUploadChecks
data.value: Harpyx does not simply store a file. After upload, it first checks that the file is allowed and safe to process. If the file passes those checks, Harpyx keeps the original document and starts preparing a searchable version of its content.

data.name: AfterUploadPreparationBeforeStatus
data.value: During preparation, Harpyx extracts text from the document. For long files, archives, emails or scanned material, this can take a little time. The document status tells you where it is in the process:

data.name: DocumentStatusPending
data.value: pending

data.name: AfterUploadPreparationBetweenStatuses
data.value: or

data.name: DocumentStatusProcessing
data.value: processing

data.name: AfterUploadPreparationAfterProcessing
data.value: means Harpyx is still working;

data.name: DocumentStatusReady
data.value: ready

data.name: AfterUploadPreparationAfterReady
data.value: means the document can be used by search and chat.

data.name: AfterUploadSearchableParts
data.value: Once the content is ready, Harpyx breaks it into smaller searchable parts. This helps the app find the passages that matter for a specific question instead of sending the whole document every time.

data.name: AfterUploadQuestionFlow
data.value: When you ask a question, Harpyx looks at the documents selected in the project, finds the most relevant prepared passages, and sends that context to the configured chat model. In practice, the assistant answers with help from the project documents rather than relying only on general knowledge.

data.name: DocumentsAndChatTitle
data.value: Documents And Chat

data.name: DocumentStatusCardTitle
data.value: Document status matters

data.name: DocumentStatusCardDescription
data.value: Pending or processing documents are still being prepared. Ready documents can be used for search and chat.

data.name: SelectedDocumentsCardTitle
data.value: Selected documents guide chat

data.name: SelectedDocumentsCardDescription
data.value: In a project, select the documents you want the assistant to use before sending your prompt.

data.name: ProvidersCardTitle
data.value: Providers power AI features

data.name: ProvidersCardDescription
data.value: Chat needs a chat model. Document retrieval works best when an embedding model is also configured.
